summary: Inventory Ledger Alignment feature fully verified. All 3 new backend endpoints working (inventory-alignment, dora-metrics, dora-correlation). Frontend UnifiedOpsView component renders correctly with all 6 blocks and 4 DORA metric cards. Ops Merkezi tab is default active tab in ControlPlane.jsx.

issues: i18n translation keys showing briefly before translation loads - known pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_alignment.py correctly reads from room_type_inventory materialized view (not bookings)
Backend dora_metrics.py returns all 4 DORA metrics with value+rating structure
Backend dora_correlation returns correlations array with inference field
Frontend UnifiedOpsView.jsx correctly fetches from all 4 endpoints (inventory-alignment, dora-metrics, dora-correlation, deploy-stats)
Frontend ControlPlane.jsx has Ops Merkezi tab as defaultValue='ops'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Ledger Alignment feature verified. Three new endpoints: GET /api/ops/dashboard/inventory-alignment (returns alignment_status, freshness, drift_count, drift_nights, provider_breakdown, connectors_checked), GET /api/ops/dashboard/dora-metrics (returns metrics object with deployment_frequency, change_failure_rate, mttr, lead_time - each with value+rating), GET /api/ops/dashboard/dora-correlation (returns correlations array with inference field). Frontend UnifiedOpsView component at /control-plane with Ops Merkezi tab (data-testid='tab-ops') as default. All 6 blocks render: alignment-block, dora-block, deploy-health-block, provider-health-block, correlation-block, recon-queue-block. 4 DORA metric cards: dora-deploy-freq, dora-cfr, dora-mttr, dora-lead-time. Drill-down buttons present.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/inventory-alignme.returns: {alignment_status, freshness, drift_count, drift_nights, provider_breakdown, connectors_checked, inventory_room_type_nights, date_range, computed_at}

GET /api/ops/dashboard/dora-metrics.returns: {period_days, environment, total_deploys, metrics: {deployment_frequency, change_failure_rate, mttr, lead_time}, trend, computed_at}

GET /api/ops/dashboard/dora-correlation.returns: {period_days, tenant_id, correlations: [{name, question, first_half, second_half, inference}], computed_at}

frontend_elements.tab-ops: PASS - Ops Merkezi tab visible and active by default
frontend_elements.alignment-block: PASS - Shows HIZALI status, 5 connectors, freshness=fresh
frontend_elements.dora-block: PASS - Shows 4 metric cards with VERI YOK ratings (no deploy data)
frontend_elements.provider-health-block: PASS - Shows 5 hotelrunner providers all hizali
frontend_elements.recon-queue-block: PASS - Shows FRESH status, 105 oda-tip-gece kaydi
